Barcode rules: Assign string literals to all FieldMergeBarcode properties because they are defined as string types in Aspose.Words.
Keep the cast to FieldMergeBarcode when inserting the field.
Call Update() on the field after setting properties to render the barcode.
Keep the IBarcodeGenerator implementation – only the image creation logic changes.
Do not reference System.Drawing or any graphics‑related types; the barcode is generated by the DISPLAYBARCODE field itself.
Use FieldDisplayBarcode (or FieldMergeBarcode) from Aspose.Words.Fields to set barcode options.
Saving/Export rules: Save the document in DOCX format after configuring the field.
Images/Shapes/OLE rules: Replace System.Drawing usage with SkiaSharp to avoid platform‑specific dependencies.
Do not modify the public API of Aspose.Words; only the internal image generation is altered.
